name: Intumit Inc.
summary: Intumit, Inc. provides artificial intelligence and CX solutions primarily in China. The company's products include SmartRobot, a solution to help enterprises in establishing automate smart service platforms across Websites, FB Messenger, LINE, WeChat, WhatsApp, Microsoft Services, APPs, and other channels; SmartKMS, a cognitive knowledge management system; SmartWork, a Microsoft 365 internal helpdesk; WFH solutions, a personal internal helpdesk assistant for information technology, human resource, call centers, and other areas; AOG, a Google assistant solution; SmartForce, a solution for customer interaction; SmartNow, a workplace management solution; SmartXP, a customer engagement solution; and Smartonnect, a solution to collect customers' interests and info from conversations and speech dialogues. It primarily serves financial services, insurance, healthcare, retail/FMCG, public service/education, tourism/transportation, and manufacturing sectors. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
